task_or_change_summary: Phase9 T1-T4 live harness adoption pilot for _inspect_agent_lab
applicable_rules_summary: Never treat canonical source unavailability as an implicit pass.
Degraded results do not replace live close evidence.
Owner, reviewer, branch protection, and secrets ownership must stay explicit.

degraded_marker.unavailable_reason: live source missing for one or more dimensions
degraded_marker.required_follow_up_owner_evidence: user confirmation or live GitHub/owner evidence

canonical_policy_source.summary: canonical policy source is unavailable; snapshot fallback is being used.
canonical_policy_source.currency_note: External canonical policy source is not live-connected in harness-system; authoritative docs snapshot is used.

unresolved_risks.target_specific_impact: Policy adapter is not backed by a live Thinking OS / Obsidian source.
unresolved_risks.required_owner_or_evidence: canonical source access or refreshed authoritative snapshot

dimension_results.summary: branch protection is backed by live or explicit source evidence.
reviewer ownership is backed by live or explicit source evidence.
workflow update strategy is backed by live or explicit source evidence.
Drive secrets owner is backed by live or explicit source evidence.
